plugins.name: OpenRouter Provider
plugins.description: Adds OpenRouter as a first-class LLM provider.

plugins.name: Grammar Tools
plugins.description: Corrects character input grammar through the active structured LLM provider.

plugins.name: Character Converter
plugins.description: Converts text and open Character Card V1/V2/V3 files into reviewable native character preset drafts.

plugins.name: Dynamic Character Presence
plugins.description: Lets the human mark who starts in a scene and move characters in/out mid-session, with optional Narrator control.

plugins.name: Creme Theme
plugins.description: Warm cream palette in the Anthropic editorial style; swaps the default dark look for ivory surfaces with terracotta accents.

plugins.name: Suggestion Preloader
plugins.description: Pre-fetches move suggestions in the background after each turn, so they are ready while the player reads.
